creator: nalitoja@gmail.com
text:
"Hartmann, O." <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de> writes:

> LD      libswscale/libswscale.so.1
> /usr/bin/ld: libswscale/x86/rgb2rgb.o: relocation R_X86_64_PC32 against `ff_bgr2YCoeff' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC
> /usr/bin/ld: final link failed: Bad value

I've seen a similar issue caused by clang+ccache on -fPIC -DPIC check in
libtool. Can you try to reproduce with -Qunused-arguments in CFLAGS,
without devel/ccache or with recent clang per /stable/9@226890 ?
